title: ebenus laguroides subsp. pisidica
intro: Ebenus laguroides subsp. pisidica, also known as the Cretan spiny restharrow, is a plant species in the genus Ebenus, characterized by its spiny stems and purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Ebenus laguroides subsp. pisidica include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its possible antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
